title: Lekcija 13

fillInTheBlank.sentence:
Bob: Maybe move some tasks around or prioritize the most important ones?

Maria: That might help, but we need to be BLANK not to BLANK out the team.

blanks.feedback: Ova reč znači obratiti pažnju ili izbegavati greške ili probleme.
Ovo znači umoriti nekoga ili ga učiniti tako umornim da ne može nastaviti sa radom.

dialogue.text: Maybe move some tasks around or prioritize the most important ones?
That might help, but we need to be careful not to burn out the team.

instructions: Slušajte audio i dovršite sledeću rečenicu.
explanation:
Kada koristite pridjev praćen negde promenljivim glagolom (infinitiv), negativna forma se stvara dodavanjem not to pre glagola. Primer:

  • Chanya: She was happy to help with the project. - Ovo znači pomoći projektu da ga učini uživanju.

  • Hasi: He was careful not to forget the deadline. - To znači da je proverio/osigurao da se seti.

To burn out To znači biti veoma umoran ili iscrpljen usled prevelike količine posla. Na primer:

If we don't take breaks, we might burn out before the project is finished. - To znači da raditi bez odmora može izazvati veliku umornost/ekstremnu iscrpljenost.
